  • Uses of Position in com.example.battleship.controller

    Fields in com.example.battleship.controller declared as Position
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private Position
    CombatController.selectedPosition
    The cell picked on the first click, waiting for a second click on the same cell to confirm.
    Methods in com.example.battleship.controller with parameters of type Position
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    CombatController.applyShotFeedback(javafx.scene.Group boardGroup, Map<Ship,Ship3D> shipViews, Position position, ShotResult result, Ship ship)
    Applies the correct 3D feedback for one resolved shot: a red X on the water for a miss, or -- via Ship3D.markHit(int) -- the matching wreckage/hull change on the ship that got hit.
    void
    CombatController.HumanBoardListener.onShotResolved(Position position, ShotResult result, Ship ship)
     
    void
    CombatController.MachineBoardListener.onShotResolved(Position position, ShotResult result, Ship ship)
     
    private void
    MainGameController.replayHit(Cell cell, Map<Ship,Ship3D> shipViews, Position position)
    Applies a single already-recorded hit/sunk cell to the 3D shape of whichever ship occupies it, via Ship3D.markHit(int).

    Method
    Description
    Position
    MachinePlayer.chooseShot(Board opponentBoard)
    Chooses this machine's next shot on the opponent's board, using its ShootingStrategy.
    Position
    HuntShootingStrategy.chooseTarget(Board opponentBoard)
    Chooses the next cell to shoot at on the opponent's board.
    Position
    RandomShootingStrategy.chooseTarget(Board opponentBoard)
    Chooses the next cell to shoot at on the opponent's board.
    Position

    Methods in com.example.battleship.model.player that return types with arguments of type Position
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private List<Position>
    HuntShootingStrategy.allOrthogonalNeighborsOf(Board board, List<Position> cluster)
    Every unshot orthogonal neighbor of every cell in the cluster, combined -- the fallback once both line-ends are exhausted.
    private List<Position>
    HuntShootingStrategy.candidatesForCluster(Board board, List<Position> cluster)
    A lone hit means the orientation isn't known yet -- probe all four sides.
    private List<Position>
    HuntShootingStrategy.collectHitCluster(Board board, Position start, Set<Position> visited)
    Flood-fills every orthogonally-connected hit cell starting from start.
    private List<Position>
    HuntShootingStrategy.findHuntCandidates(Board board)
    Finds every connected cluster of hit cells and collects each one's own hunting candidates.
    private List<Position>
    HuntShootingStrategy.lineExtensionCandidates(Board board, List<Position> cluster)
    The two cells just past each end of an already-established line of hits.
    private List<Position>
    HuntShootingStrategy.orthogonalNeighborsInBounds(Position center)
     
    private List<Position>
    HuntShootingStrategy.unshotOrthogonalNeighbors(Board board, Position hit)

    Method parameters in com.example.battleship.model.player with type arguments of type Position
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    HuntShootingStrategy.addIfInBoundsAndShootable(Board board, int row, int column, List<Position> candidates)
    Adds (row, column) to candidates if it's within the board and hasn't been shot at yet; otherwise does nothing.
    private List<Position>
    HuntShootingStrategy.allOrthogonalNeighborsOf(Board board, List<Position> cluster)
    Every unshot orthogonal neighbor of every cell in the cluster, combined -- the fallback once both line-ends are exhausted.
    private List<Position>
    HuntShootingStrategy.candidatesForCluster(Board board, List<Position> cluster)
    A lone hit means the orientation isn't known yet -- probe all four sides.
    private List<Position>
    HuntShootingStrategy.collectHitCluster(Board board, Position start, Set<Position> visited)
    Flood-fills every orthogonally-connected hit cell starting from start.
    private List<Position>
    HuntShootingStrategy.lineExtensionCandidates(Board board, List<Position> cluster)
    The two cells just past each end of an already-established line of hits.
